Enclosing class:
Service.MetricDataPoint
public static final class Service.MetricDataPoint.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3.Builder<Service.MetricDataPoint.Builder> implements Service.MetricDataPointOrBuilder
 A single data point with dimension values and metric values.
Protobuf type mlflow.MetricDataPoint
